fields.Name: BYO Regression Suite
fields.Description: Regression suite targeting the bring-your-own-app demo (Angular + Express with two intentional bugs). Both tests are EXPECTED TO FAIL against the buggy demo app — that's the point: this exercises the runner's ability to catch real regressions in non-MJ applications.

Configuration.applicationContext:
## BYO Demo App

A tiny Angular + Express SPA. Two routes, no authentication, no shared session state.

### Routes
- `/counter` — a counter UI with a single `+1` button. Clicking the button increments a displayed number starting at 0.
- `/contact` — a contact form (Name, Email, Message fields) with a Submit button. After successful submission, a green confirmation banner appears inline below the form.

### Navigation landmarks
- A horizontal top nav at the page top has two links — `Counter` and `Contact` — that route between the two pages. No login, no app switcher.
- The page body is centered in a max-width container; there is no sidebar.

### Conventions
- All UI is rendered immediately on page load; there is no spinner. A blank page is an error state, not a loading state.
- Form inputs are labeled above the field (Name / Email / Message).

fields.TestID: @lookup:MJ: Tests.Name=BYO T01 - Counter Increments On Click
@lookup:MJ: Tests.Name=BYO T02 - Contact Form Shows Confirmation
